planet_status.status_detail: Both experiments complete, reusable, integrated into pack. A/B comparison framework staged but not yet measured.

experiments.name: Experimento 2: La Paradoja del Flujo Maestro
experiments.objective: Detect logical contradiction in hierarchical process mapping + risk rules (5-rule system, 1 subprocess, irresolvable state)

result.architectural_recommendation: D (decompose subprocess) or E (escalate to stakeholder)

reusability.for_model_comparison: Yes — copy case block to any LLM to test reasoning depth across models

experiments.name: Industrial Sales Dirty Data Pipeline

scope.dirty_classes: E1..E10 forced (≥20 each): invisibles, mojibake, cross-locale numerics, O↔0, NaN/%/units, multi-format dates, null/duplicate IDs, outliers, broken lines

artifacts.comparative_report: COMPARATIVE_REPORT.md (analysis of Agent A vs Agent B trade-offs)

pipeline_steps: Step 0: Generate dirty CSV (65K rows) + sample (120 rows)
Step 2: Clean + Quarantine (clean CSV + quarantine CSV + dq_report.json)
Step 4-5: Render templates → REPORT.md + AUDIT_REPORT.md + RECOMMENDATIONS.md

a_b_framework.agent_a: Direct responses, higher narrative output → higher chat token cost per step
a_b_framework.agent_b: Orchestrator + artifact-first → Token Gate overhead amortized across phases
comparison_dimensions: Token economy (proxy: chat output size per phase)

fronts_status.ILLUMINATE: ✅ A/B framework documented, auditability design pattern modeled, no ungoverned AI found

integration_points.orchestrator_gate: ✅ Token Gate + artifact-first documented in promptdivers-orchestrator SKILL.md + docs/prompt-economics.md
integration_points.installer_vendoring: ✅ experiments/ included in install.sh --vendor-framework and install.ps1 -VendorFramework
integration_points.pack_dogfooding: ✅ Experiments serve as living test cases for orchestrator + reasoning depth
